Video.summary: Time-saving quick tips to feed your crafting craving.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Learn to sew, step-by-step with National Sewing Circle experts on CraftsyTV.
Video.grandparentTitle: National Sewing Circle presented by CraftsyTV
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Learn to knit, step-by-step with The Knitting Circle experts on CraftsyTV.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Knitting Circle Presented by CraftsyTV
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Give a new twist to traditional art forms. Jenny Barnett-Rohrs makes a trinket box inspired by a popular video game. Then, she makes a friendly turtle using the ancient art of mosaic. Candie Cooper creates pop art with polka dots in the style of the artist Kusama, and Jenny coils a rag basket with a touch of denim.
Video.title: Old is New

Video.summary: Every woodworker knows the constant struggle of needing more storage space in the shop. Learn to create your own shop solutions with the help of George Vondriska. He'll show you how to make a powerhouse storage system that will give you tons of additional real estate in your shop.
Video.grandparentTitle: Woodworkers Guild of America presented by CraftsyTV
Video.title: DIY Storage Shelving System

Video.summary: Great cuts make for more accurate quilts, and Angela is here to share some tips and tricks for quick and precise fabric cutting. Plus, she shares the best ruler sizes to have on hand.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Creative Crochet Corner is an online video streaming service all about learning how to crochet! Whether you're a new to crochet just learning the basics or an experienced crocheter looking for a challenge, Creative Crochet Corner is here to help. We offer a vast library of video tutorials taught by talented crochet experts who guide you through each technique step-by-step, sharing their best tips and tricks.
Video.grandparentTitle: Creative Crochet Corner presented by CraftsyTV
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Color adds an extra pop to any jewelry design. Designer and author Amee Sweet-McNamara blends her love of colors and shapes with soutache braid and tiny beads to create high-impact jewelry. Katie colors charms and pendants using permanent markers and alcohol inks.
Video.title: Make It Colorful

Video.summary: Learn to quilt step by step with National Quilting Circle experts on CraftsyTV.
Video.grandparentTitle: National Quilting Circle presented by CraftsyTV
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The simple wooden spatula is an essential cooking tool that adds a handmade touch to any kitchen. George Vondriska demonstrates how to make your own wooden spatula in a few easy steps. This easy project makes a great gift for any home chef.
Video.grandparentTitle: Woodworkers Guild of America presented by CraftsyTV
Video.title: Handmade Wooden Spatula

Video.summary: George Vondriska shows you how to create a handmade ring stand that's perfect for storing rings next to the sink, on a bedside table, or even in the workshop. Then, George demonstrates how to construct a custom photo frame to hold your favorite memories. Finally, learn to make an attractive cutting board that makes an excellent handmade gift.
Video.grandparentTitle: Woodworkers Guild of America presented by CraftsyTV
Video.title: Ring Stand, Picture Frame, & Cutting Board

Image.alt: Ring Stand, Picture Frame, & Cutting Board
Ring Stand, Picture Frame, & Cutting Board
Ring Stand, Picture Frame, & Cutting Board

Video.summary: Folk art is the essence of a culture. Painter and maker Mystele Kirkeeng paints abstract folk art faces and figures. Tool expert Joe Rotella uses baker's twine to weave new art on a tin tile. Host Julie Fei-Fan Balzer draws repeating shapes to create a meditative mandala. Jane Dunnewold shares another artistic perspective.
Video.title: Folk Art

Video.summary: Broaden your thought process and learn to take a fresh look with some creative thinking. Ginny Robinson discusses creating modern quilts that are inspired by other crafts - translating a silhouette, a pattern design, or a texture for a new outlook. Rossie Hutchinson uses creative thinking to put together improv quilts utilizing a design wall. Then, Anne Sullivan has another improv technique using strip piecing. Eliane Bergmann demonstrates "franken batting" in the machine tip – a way to save money by learning how to join leftover pieces of batting.
Video.title: Creative Thinking

Video.summary: This is not a drill! Angela has heard your requests loud and clear, and she's finally making the Bargello quilt that everyone's been asking for! So break out the layer cakes and prepare to get crazy with precuts.
Video.title: Modern Bargello

Video.summary: All quilters can get stuck in a creative rut, even Angela. This week, she turns to strip piecing and her fun, easy-to-piece chevron pattern to get her quilting mojo back. Plus, she'll show you how to use negative space to bring your quilt to life.
Video.title: Strip-Pieced Contemporary Chevron Quilt

Video.summary: WARNING: The following content depicts excessive charm square usage and may be too exciting for most quilters. In other words, Angela's ready to take on 200+ precuts, and the accompanying placement decisions.
Video.title: Star Squared

Video.summary: Forget milk and cookies, in Angela's house, it's all about the wine and popcorn. Spend the night before Christmas piecing triangles and playing with negative space while you wait up for Santa with Angela.
Video.title: Santorini

Video.summary: Angela's reminded of her age as she relies on her kids to keep up with the digital world. Watch as she uses two basic shapes to create a mod half-square triangle quilt that's easier to make than it looks.
Video.title: Modern Technology Half-Square Triangle Quilt

Video.summary: Season 10 of "The Midnight Quilt Show" wraps with Angela making modern ombré wall hanging to display in a *very* exclusive art exhibition.
Video.title: Modern Ombré Wall Hanging

Video.summary: Forget milk and cookies, in Angela's house, it's all about the wine and popcorn. Spend the night before Christmas piecing triangles and playing with negative space while you wait up for Santa with Angela.
Video.title: Santorini

Video.summary: This week's quilt radiates piece and love. Angela uses color placement for a heart-shaped quilt that's easier to make than it looks. IMPORTANT NOTE: The "Piece & Love" quilt designed by Audrey Mann and Dianne Brinton is no longer included with the class.
Video.title: Piece & Love Quilt

Video.summary: As the first World War began, supplies became scarce. Women joined the workforce as men fought overseas. Fashions became less restrictive, bustles disappeared and the silhouette became sleeker. Designers used scraps for embellishment and manipulated fabric to create design details. Rebecca Kemp Brent shows how to create beautiful scrap fabric flowers. Angela Wolf uses couture draping techniques to add fashion flair to a straight skirt.
Video.title: The World at War - 1910-1919

Video.summary: Mixed media artist Susan Lenart Kazmer demonstrates making faux stones with glass glitter, inclusions and resin, and then she shows cold surface work to mimic enameling on metal. Today's Beading Lesson is on knotting with leather.
Video.title: Get Creative with Resin and Wire

Image.alt: Get Creative with Resin and Wire
Get Creative with Resin and Wire
Get Creative with Resin and Wire

Video.summary: Create custom colors and add a new twist to traditional techniques. Katie Hacker combines metals with stones and beads to make her style statement. Artist syndee holt blends polymer clay to create new colors and contemporary designs using the ancient art of mokume gane. Designer Jill MacKay shares a great die-cutting tip as she embellishes leather to make dangly earrings.
Video.title: Color Explorations

Video.summary: Join us as we mix art, craft and scrapbook for a delicious result. Scrapbook meets art and craft as we write on gesso, learn a technique for making decorative tissue tape with Sara Naumann, and embellish our way to a great frame using a hoop with Vicki O'Dell.
Video.title: Meeting of Art and Craft

Video.summary: This show offers lots of new tips and techniques using stencils. Create your own stencil and learn about masking with Jenny Barnett Rohrs. A short interview features Stacy Julian as she shares her system of "get it done fast". Then, Julie demonstrates a layering technique using new stencil designs. Last, Julie shares more stenciling tips using stamping, painting, doodling and more.
Video.title: Episode 3: Stencils

Video.summary: Cozy is calling! Join the ladies in an ode to warm projects, winter stews and all things bulky.
Video.title: Why We Love Cold Weather Knitting Projects

Image.alt: Why We Love Cold Weather Knitting Projects
Why We Love Cold Weather Knitting Projects
Why We Love Cold Weather Knitting Projects

Video.summary: Who says short hair and hats don't mix? From styling tips to pompom grooming, the girls know a thing or two about hand knits and cropped 'dos.
Video.title: How to Wear a Knit Hat with Short Hair

Image.alt: How to Wear a Knit Hat with Short Hair
How to Wear a Knit Hat with Short Hair
How to Wear a Knit Hat with Short Hair

Video.summary: Anything can happen in the world of make-believe. Jenny Barnett-Rohrs turns into a scary monster with a fun headband. Katie Hacker makes a fantasy tent and then whips up a never-ending cherry pie. Jenny shows how to create a show with puppets you make yourself from blogger Mom Carolina Moore.
Video.title: Make Believe

Video.summary: Welcome to Artists's Academy where we are dedicated to making you a better artist. We believe everyone has an artist within, waiting to be unleashed. Our mission is to be your ultimate resource for visual art education using tutorials covering everything from fundamental techniques to advanced concepts in painting and drawing.
Video.title: Artist's Academy presented by CraftsyTV

Video.summary: Learn to bake and cook with CraftsyTV.
Video.title: Baking & Cooking

Video.summary: Time-saving quick tips to feed your crafting craving.
Video.title: Craft Hacks

Video.summary: Welcome to CraftsyTV's Cook & Create, where delectable delights meet crafty creators.
Video.title: Cook & Create

Video.summary: We all love a quilt that looks harder than it is! Join Angela for a nine-patch within a nine-patch within, yes, another nine-patch.
Video.title: Episode 1
